title: Diesel Generator 14kW Kubota V1505 w Newage Alternator
ai_notes: [Diesel Generator 14kW] Industrial diesel generator, priced well for a quick sale.
description:
I have for sale a used diesel generator. The engine is a 4 cyl Kubota V1505 and it runs at 1800 RPM. The generator is a Newage BCI164D1. This is a 12 lead generator so it can be configured for 277/480Vac 3 Phase, 120/208Vac 3 Phase or 120/240 single phase voltage output. In 3 phase configuration this generator will output @ 14kW. It will be about 10kW for single phase as the generator head is derated for single phase use. This setup has a brand new radiator, air cleaner, muffler and fuel filter installed. It has an auto start controller on it. Just push start and it will run the glow plugs, crank & start the engine along with monitor for safety shutdown. I have load tested the unit for over an hour at loads between 12-14kW and can demonstrate that for any buyer. This weighs 600 lbs and is approx. 44 long x 26 wide and 33" to the top of the radiator.
Would be great for irrigation units, car haulers, mobile mechanic, farm trailer etc.

Key Details About Maison Jansen Banana/Palm Trees:
Design & Style: These are large, decorative metal sculptures from the 1970s, often attributed to the prestigious French design house Maison Jansen. They represent the luxury, tropical, and maximalist aesthetic popular in Hollywood Regency interior design.
Structure: They often feature a solid brass base, with ribbed sheet metal leaves that can sometimes be arranged or assembled in slots.
Variations: While the "banana tree" with fruit is a specific, rare item, it is often grouped with the more common Maison Jansen brass palm trees and banana leaf floor lamps/chandeliers.
Usage: They are used as sculptural focal points in high-end interiors, often placed in corners or next to furniture.

title: 2013 Black MINI Cooper Countryman S – 6 Speed
ai_notes: [2013 MINI Cooper Countryman S] High mileage for a MINI, but well-maintained by enthusiast owner.
description:
We’re selling our beloved 2013 Absolute Black Metallic MINI Cooper Countryman S -
6-Speed Manual – Dual Sunroof – Black Interior - 165,745 Miles – in Roeland Park, KS
Have you always wanted a MINI Cooper but couldn’t live without four doors? Us too! Have all the fun of a MINI Cooper S (turbo) with all the practicality of a four-door hatch. Sadly we have to let her go because we’re moving and have too many cars ☹
I’m kind of a car guy and this has been mostly my wife’s car so you can bet I have always made sure it was kept up, running well, cleaned regularly and of course it spent almost its entire life in a climate-controlled garage.
Location: Roeland Park, KS 66205 Just off I35 and down Roe BLVD, about 7 minutes SW from downtown KC
Mileage: 165,745 (and counting?)
VIN: WMWZC3C57DWP51247
History: We are the 2nd owners after having bought the car from a dealership here in Merriam, KS in 2015. The maintenance has always been kept up and there have been no accidents or damage to the car. I got the Carfax to show it was a clean title and all that but forgot to download it and the link died so let me know if you need it and I’ll get another one.
Exterior: It’s a nice metallic black with tinted windows and upgraded wheels so it looks pretty sharp. It is 13 years old so of course it has a couple dings and scuffs but you wouldn’t notice the from ten feet (see pics). This car is pretty loaded so it has the HID headlight package, roof rails, chrome trim and comes with a tow hitch. The wheels are the upgraded aluminum 18” rims with new tires from just last year.
Interior: The interior is in really good shape for 13 years old. Again, pretty nicely appointed. It is all black on black “leather” interior with MINI’s iconic center console speedometer. The stereo has a factory CD player, Blue Tooth for your phone with built in mic along with aux and USB ports. We have added a heads-up LCD screen that does Android Auto, Apple CarPlay and front facing accident recording (plus some other stuff we don’t use).
The back seats fold down all three seats separately for an unexpected amount of cargo space. It comes with a cargo cover for the trunk, full cargo nets and a full set of front and back MINI brand rubber floor mats along with brand new (never used?) OEM carpeted mats. It’s got the dual sunroofs that both do that slant open thing but then the front one will go all the way back with a little wind screen that pops up. Both have shade screens to cover them if it gets too sunny. Oh, and the interior door lights can change colors or phase through the colors (our son loves that!).
The front seats will fold back to an acceptable napping position, it has a center console compartment that can fold back up out of its way, and it comes with a mounted MINI brand sunglasses case. The AC is cold, the heat is hot and the stereo is loud. Everything works as it should.
Engine: It runs a front-wheel drive 1.6-liter, turbocharged inline-4 engine producing 181 horsepower and 177 lb-ft of torque, so it’s got some pep to it. The engine is paired with a 6-speed manual transmission and gets approx. 26 MPG City / 32 MPG Hwy. The clutch was replaced last year along with the coil packs and plugs. Oil and air filters get changed regularly when needed as well as oil changes. Even though not required the car has been run almost exclusively on premium gas and will come with a full tank.
Asking Price: $8000 firm for now, if it doesn’t sell in the next couple weeks then I might negotiate.
Free ice scraper and tire pressure gauge!!! ;)
Geoff - Owner.

This high-quality CD player is easy to operate and includes special features like Pure Direct, Intelligent Digital Servo, USB and MP3/WMA/LPCM/FLAC compatibility.
Enjoy your MP3, WMA, LPCM, AAC and FLAC music
The USB port on the front panel gives you an easy way to enjoy high-quality sound from MP3, WMA, LPCM, AAC or FLAC digital music files stored on USB memory devices. You can also play files recorded on CD-R/RW discs.
3-mode CD text display
Information about the currently playing CD is shown right on the CD player’s display. The 3-mode CD Text display shows the CD’s title, the artist’s name and the title of the track.
Well-matched, high-quality parts
Including a high-grade acoustic capacitor, a new low-noise, high-gain bandwidth op amp and the use of damping material under the transformer and around the signal cables are just a few examples of the Yamaha commitment to great sound quality.
Pure direct
By pressing the button on the front panel or on the remote control, it shuts down the digital audio output and turns off the display. This achieves the lowest possible noise interference and, therefore, the highest sound quality of the analog audio output.
Short signal paths
This purposeful design also keeps the paths between sections straight and short, minimizing the chance of signal loss or interference; something not easy to achieve.

ai_notes: [PreSonus R80 studio monitors] Professional studio monitors; high-end audio gear has a smaller, more specific buyer base.
description:
Presonus _R80 pro audio monitors - $465 (Lansing)
Presonus _R80 pro audio monitors__ immaculate PAIR__
I LOVE CORPORATIONS__ THEY MAKE THE GREATEST THINGS
Bring your audio production to new heights with the R Series 8" AMT Studio Monitor, a high-quality, professional-grade studio monitor designed for both commercial and home recording studios, as well as broadcast and post-production environments. This innovative monitor features a custom 6.8-square inch Air Motion Transformer (AMT) tweeter that responds to the subtlest waveforms and the highest frequencies, allowing you to experience the 'air' and greater sense of space characteristic of audiophile recordings.
Unlike conventional dome tweeters, the AMT tweeter in the R Series 8" AMT Studio Monitor uses an incredibly thin, folded Kapton membrane, ensuring superior transient response time. This design provides 8 to 13 times the projection area of a traditional 1-inch dome tweeter, resulting in a much wider stereo soundstage.
The R Series 8" AMT Studio Monitor is equipped with custom-coated, woven Kevlar low-frequency drivers, delivering a more consistent dispersion pattern across its frequency response range. Powered by a 150W Class D amplifier, these monitors offer an open, clear, and less fatiguing listening experience.
Designed for seamless integration into any studio environment, the R Series 8" AMT Studio Monitor offers user-adjustable contour features, including a four-position Acoustic Space switch and a high-frequency driver level control. An onboard highpass filter makes it easy to integrate a Temblor subwoofer into your monitor setup.
With balanced XLR, balanced 1/4" TRS, and unbalanced RCA line-level inputs, it's easy to connect your R-Series monitors to a mixer, an interface, a media player, or almost any other line-level source. The responsive nature of the R Series 8" AMT Studio Monitor design provides lifelike sonic reproduction, making it an ideal solution for anyone mixing high-resolution audio.
The R Series 8" AMT Studio Monitor also comes with the 2021 PreSonus Studio Magic Plug-In Suite, which includes over $1000 worth of effects, virtual instruments, and sound libraries in VST, AU, and AAX formats. Plus, you'll get Studio One 5 Prime, a powerful tool for content creation and audio production.
In conclusion, the R Series 8" AMT Studio Monitor is a reliable, durable, and innovative solution for all your audio production needs.

title: REDUCED - "MINT" Nikon D810 (USA) SLR Camera
ai_notes: [Nikon D810 DSLR camera] Well-maintained camera with low shutter count for its age.
description:
Mint "USA" Nikon D810.  New these went for $2800 + tax.  This is the final reduction I will make on this camera.
Shutter count/actuations are a very low 17,057 as of 4/22/2026.  Nikon says they are good for at least 200,000+.  Most get about 300,000+.  It has taken me almost five years to get to this shutter count and I am a semi-pro who uses it for all my indoor studio shots.
This camera has 36.3 MP (you will probably never need to go over 8-10 MP for incredible photos), which can easily be enlarged more than you will ever probably need.
I only use this camera indoors in my home studio.  Non-smoking, dog-free environment and kept in a safe with humidity control.  I take great care of my equipment.
Check out the photos.  I take very detailed shots so you can see what you are buying.
The Dr. Pepper photo was taken with this camera using a 105mm macro lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio.  The bowl of soup photo was taken with this camera using a 50mm lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio and the "hamburger" photo was also taken with this camera using a 105mm macro lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio as well.
The camera looks virtually brand new.
Included:
Box
Manuals
Battery
Battery charger
Strap
View NX2 installer CD
Original warranty card (Proof of USA Model)
Missing a short USB cable (UC-E22 cable)... about $25 if you want one.  Not needed unless you want to hook directly to your computer.
Be careful of non-USA Nikon products (grey market items).  Nikon will not repair or work on them if you ever need work done on it.

​Lips Section: 4.5 Feet Tall x 7 Feet Wide.
​Soft Serve Cone: 7 Feet Tall.
​Depth: 8–12 inch 3D embossed profile.
​Collector Features:
​Crack-Free: Sign is fully intact withe the exception of the bottom portion detached, with no cracks, which is highly unusual for its age.
​Diagnostic Base Included: I am including the detached lower portion of the sign. It features the authentic 1950s/60s blue-and-white striped "Brazier" color scheme.  This identifies the set as a true mid-century survivor rather than a later discard.
​Project Potential: Perfect for a high-end shop display or man cave. Ready to be cleaned and backlit with a simple DIY LED setup.
​Terms:
​Price: $600 cash. FIRM
Priced fairly for a reseller to double their investment or a collector to get a "statement piece" below auction rates.
​Trades: Open to trades valued at $800
​Pickup: This is a massive, single-piece unit. You will need a flatbed trailer or a full-sized truck with a rack. Located in the Pleasanton area.

title: Vintage Mid Century Modern 1960s Oil Painting Van Gaard Vanguard Studi

description:
Vintage Mid Century Modern 1960s Oil Painting by Van Gaard Vanguard Studios 30x40
VAN GAARD Original Oil Painting Vintage 30x40 inches #319-W City view RARE!
Painting is in excellent condition. Superb 1960s mid-century original painting by the Van Gaard Studio of Beverly Hills, CA, owned by American artist Lee Reynolds Burr. Framed in an original dark stained hardwood frame, this painting is signed in the top right hand corner by Van Gaard.
The painting's dimensions are: Width: 30”, Height: 40”.
Including the frame, the dimensions are: Width: 36”, Height: 46”.
I believe the painting is Acrylic on Masonite but I am not sure. It has an abundance of texture (bumpy paint) on it.
Still has the paper backing on it which says 319-W, the paper backing has a few rips. The 3 inch wood frame has screw holes in it from where it was hung. Painting is in excellent condition!
About This Van Gaard Painting
Van Gaard is a name associated with mid-20th-century decorative art produced by Vanguard Studios (sometimes linked with artist Lee Reynolds). These works were created primarily in the 1950s–1960s as oil or acrylic paintings, often signed Van Gaard and sold as collectible or decorative art pieces.
Works attributed to Van Gaard typically feature:
- Mid-Century Modern style — bold compositions, abstract or figurative themes
- Oil or acrylic on board or canvas
- Signed by Van Gaard
- Often framed for display.

description:
If you want the look of wide plank white oak without paying retail prices, this is it.
We have 21,928 square feet of Noble's Way engineered white oak in the Winter River finish priced at $1.99 per square foot. This is first quality, U.S.-made flooring -- not seconds, not overrun junk, not a discontinued line nobody wanted. It's a legitimate deal on a legitimate product.
The 7.25" wide plank gives you that open, modern look you see in high-end homes and design magazines. The Winter River color runs light and cool -- a whitewashed, natural oak tone that works with gray walls, blue walls, warm neutrals, and everything in between. The wirebrushed surface texture adds depth and hides everyday wear. The micro bevel edge gives each board a clean, defined look that reads as intentional, not cheap.
The specs matter on engineered, and these are solid: 3/8" thick construction, low gloss finish, and a 25-year residential warranty. Wide planks at this thickness are designed to be glued down or floated, making this a practical choice for slabs and above-grade installations alike.
At $1.99 a square foot for first quality white oak this wide, you are not going to find this price at a flooring showroom. Retail on comparable 7" and wider engineered white oak runs $6 to $10 per square foot regularly.
